name: DDoS + Smokescreen: Mirai Botnet + Concurrent Data Breach
description: A sophisticated dual-track attack: a Mirai-variant botnet launches a massive volumetric DDoS (SYN flood + UDP amplification via DNS/NTP) to distract the SOC while a concurrent stealth data breach extracts sensitive data. The DDoS serves as a smokescreen to overwhelm analyst attention during the real exfiltration. Modeled on Dyn 2016 and subsequent copycat attacks.

phases.name: Reconnaissance — Port Scanning for DDoS Amplifiers
phases.description: Botnet command node scans for open DNS resolvers (UDP/53), NTP servers (UDP/123), SSDP devices (UDP/1900), and Memcached instances (UDP/11211) to use as DDoS amplification vectors. Scanning intensity: 10,000 packets/second.

phases.name: Volumetric DDoS — SYN Flood (100 Gbps)
phases.description: Coordinated SYN flood from 50,000+ Mirai-infected IoT devices targeting the corporate web infrastructure. Bandwidth: ~100 Gbps. Connection table exhaustion causes legitimate users to be unable to connect.
phases.technique_name: Network Denial of Service: Direct Network Flood

phases.name: DNS Amplification Attack (UDP Reflection)
phases.description: Attackers use open DNS resolvers to amplify traffic 50x, spoofing source IPs to victim's IP. 10,000 DNS resolvers each receive 512-byte ANY queries and reply with 4KB+ responses to the victim, generating 40 Gbps.
phases.technique_name: Network Denial of Service: Reflection Amplification

phases.name: Application Layer DDoS (Layer 7 — HTTP Flood)
phases.description: While volumetric attack saturates network, a coordinated HTTP flood from HTTPS-capable bots sends 500,000 requests/second targeting the login endpoint, bypassing L3/L4 mitigation.

phases.name: Concurrent Stealth Breach — Data Exfiltration (Smokescreen)
phases.description: While the SOC is overwhelmed by DDoS alerts, a concurrent breach actor uses a compromised service account to silently exfiltrate customer database backup from the secondary data center. The exfiltration traffic is dwarfed by DDoS noise.
